title: Stella's ClientSide 1.20.4 Pack
description:
A simple, clientside modpack tinkered to the vanilla feel. Spice up your, or use it as a base to create your own.

Preconfigured mods 
For Ears mod, see the mod's page.
body:
**Stella's ClientSide 1.20.4 Pack** A simple but yet effective clientside modpack tinkered to the vanilla feel. Spice up your experience with this modpack, or use it as a base to create your own. Including a whole bunch of cosmetic and QoL optimizing mods such as:
• 3D Skin layers
• Wakes
• Better F3
• Auth Me
• Controlling
• Cut Through (Grass)
• Ding!
• Freelook
• Loading Backgrounds
• Enchantment Descriptions
• More Heart types (Visual)
• Make bubbles pop!
• Mouse Tweaks
• Sodium + Indium
• Chunks Fade In
• Anime speed lines
• Client Harvest
• FullGrownCropMarker
• Tiny Item Animations
And much more!
Preconfigured mods
**Ears mod** requires an _external configurator_ for your skin, see the mod's page.
Give it a try ;)
